denmark.description: Official digital identification app for citizens and residents, used for accessing public and private services.
Portal for health information and services, allowing access to medical records and communication with healthcare providers.
Official app for public transport in Denmark, providing journey planning, live departures, and ticket information.
Widely used mobile payment app for sending money, paying in stores, and online.

united-kingdom.description: Securely prove your identity online for government services.
Access NHS services, view your health record, and order repeat prescriptions.
Comprehensive public transport planner for major UK cities.
Popular digital bank with easy-to-use mobile banking features.
One of the UK's largest banks with a feature-rich mobile app.

united-states.description: Manage your Social Security benefits and personal information.
Access your medical records, schedule appointments, and communicate with your doctor.
Real-time public transportation information for many cities.
Send and receive money between bank accounts easily.
Widely used for online payments and money transfers.

canada.description: Access government services and personal information related to benefits and pensions.
A digital health service offering virtual consultations with doctors.
Real-time public transportation information across Canadian cities.
Send and receive money securely between Canadian bank accounts.
Banking app for one of Canada's largest banks.

australia.description: Access Australian government services like Medicare, Centrelink, and the ATO.
Access Medicare services, view your health history, and claim benefits.
Public Transport Victoria journey planner for Melbourne.
Mobile banking app for Commonwealth Bank, a major Australian bank.
Popular buy-now-pay-later service for making payments.

germany.description: Official app for using your German eID card for online authentication.
Find doctors and specialists, book appointments, and manage health records.
Plan train journeys, buy tickets, and get real-time information for Deutsche Bahn.
A popular European digital bank with a strong presence in Germany.
Widely used for online payments and money transfers.

japan.description: Official app for the Japanese national identification card, used for various administrative procedures and services.
Official mobile banking app for Japan Post Bank, one of the largest financial institutions.
Comprehensive navigation app for Japan, including train, subway, and bus routes, schedules, and station information.
Dominant messaging and social media app in Japan, essential for communication.

france.description: Official app for the French national health insurance, allowing access to health records, reimbursements, and declarations.
Digital identity service allowing secure access to many French public services using a single login.
Official app for public transport in Paris and its region, offering route planning, real-time traffic, and travel information.
Popular peer-to-peer payment app and digital wallet for easy money transfers and payments.
Secure payment solution from French banks for online and in-store purchases, and P2P transfers.

singapore.description: Official digital identity app for accessing a wide range of government and private sector services in Singapore.
Official health portal app for Singapore, providing access to personal health records, appointment bookings, and health information.
Official app from Singapore's Land Transport Authority, offering public transport information, journey planner, and bus arrival times.
Mobile banking app for DBS Bank, one of Singapore's largest banks, offering account management and transaction services.
Mobile payment app by DBS, allowing users to send money, pay bills, and make QR code payments.

netherlands.description: Digital identity app for accessing Dutch government services online.
Official app from the Dutch municipal health services (GGD) for health information and services.
Most popular public transport journey planner for the Netherlands, covering all public transport operators.
Mobile banking app for ING Bank, one of the largest banks in the Netherlands.
Popular mobile-only bank with a user-friendly app for managing accounts and making payments.

sweden.description: Digital identification and signature service for online banking and government services.
Official health information and services from the Swedish healthcare system.
Public transport planner and ticket purchase for Stockholm.
Mobile payment system for instant money transfers between individuals and businesses.

norway.description: Digital identification and authentication service for online banking and public services.
Official portal for health information and services from the Norwegian Directorate of Health.
Public transport planner and ticket purchase for the Oslo and Akershus region.
Popular mobile payment app for sending money, paying bills, and online shopping.

new-zealand.description: Digital identity service for accessing government services and online accounts.
Manage your Ministry of Social Development payments and services.
Public transport planner and real-time information for Wellington region.
Mobile banking app for ASB Bank customers.
Mobile banking app for Bank of New Zealand customers.

ireland.description: Digital identity for accessing public services in Ireland.
Health information and services from the Health Service Executive (HSE).
Journey planner and real-time public transport information across Ireland.
International money transfer and digital banking.
Mobile banking with an international focus.

switzerland.description: Digital identity for accessing online services from government and private sector.
Manage your electronic patient record (EPR) and access health information.
Public transport planner, timetable, and ticketing for Swiss Federal Railways.
Mobile payment app for instant payments at the point of sale and online.
Digital banking app for everyday banking needs.

south-korea.description: Official portal for accessing government services and information.
Dominant messaging app used for personal and business communication.
Primary navigation and local information app, preferred over Google Maps in Korea.
Widely used mobile payment and financial service.
Comprehensive health tracking and management app, integrated with many devices.

spain.description: Digital identity system for accessing Spanish public administration services.
Access your personal data and administrative procedures with the Spanish public administration.
Popular app for restaurant reservations and finding local eateries.
One of Spain's largest banks, offering a comprehensive mobile banking app.
Excellent public transport planner for major Spanish cities.

italy.description: Official app for interacting with Italian public administrations and services.
Digital identity system for accessing Italian public services (often accessed via other apps like IO).
Mobile banking app for one of Italy's largest banking groups.
Comprehensive public transport app widely used across Italian cities.
Italian version of ElTenedor, popular for restaurant bookings.

portugal.description: Official app for accessing Portuguese government services and digital documents.
Digital key for authenticating and accessing public services online.
Mobile banking app for Millennium bcp, a major Portuguese bank.
Official app for purchasing train tickets and checking schedules.
Widely used ride-hailing app for getting around cities.

hong-kong.description: Digital identity app for accessing government services and online transactions.
Mobile banking app for HSBC, a prominent bank in Hong Kong.
Official app for the MTR (Mass Transit Railway) system, including journey planner and fare information.
Manage your Octopus card for public transport and retail payments.

taiwan.description: Official app for customs declaration and immigration pre-arrival procedures for Taiwan.
Access your National Health Insurance (NHI) records, view medical history, and find clinics.
Real-time bus tracking and route information for various cities in Taiwan.
Dominant messaging and calling app used widely for personal and business communication in Taiwan.
Popular third-party payment and e-wallet service in Taiwan, used for various transactions.

india.description: Official Aadhaar app for accessing Aadhaar details, downloading e-Aadhaar, and managing biometrics.
Platform for booking COVID-19 vaccination appointments and downloading certificates.
Essential for navigation, public transport, and exploring cities in India.

india.app_name: UPI Apps (e.g., Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm)
india.description: Unified Payments Interface apps are crucial for digital payments, money transfers, and bill payments across India.
Official app for booking Indian Railways train tickets.

uae.description: Official digital identity app for accessing government services and signing documents digitally.
Access your health records, book appointments, and find healthcare facilities in Dubai.
Integrated platform for planning your journeys using public transport (metro, bus, tram) in Dubai.
Digital banking app for Dubai Islamic Bank, widely used for transactions.
A popular mobile payment solution in the UAE for various transactions and bill payments.

saudi-arabia.description: Primary platform for individuals and businesses to access government services and electronic transactions.
Official health app for accessing health services, appointments, and medical records within Saudi Arabia.
Apps like 'Hafil' for intercity buses or specific city transport apps (e.g., Riyadh Metro) are essential.
A leading digital wallet and payment app in Saudi Arabia for transfers, payments, and more.
Official mobile banking app for Al Rajhi Bank, one of the largest banks in Saudi Arabia.

thailand.description: Official digital ID app for Thai citizens to access government services.

thailand.app_name: Mor Prom (หมอพร้อม)
thailand.description: Official platform for COVID-19 vaccination registration, health information, and appointment booking.
Real-time bus tracking and route planner for Bangkok and other cities in Thailand.
Dominant messaging and calling app, widely used for communication in Thailand.
One of the most popular e-wallets in Thailand for payments, transfers, and bill settlements.

malaysia.description: Official Malaysian government health and immigration app for managing health status and digital vaccine certificates.
Government-issued digital identity app for secure online transactions and access to services.
Superapp for ride-hailing, food delivery, grocery delivery, and digital payments.
Mobile banking app from Malaysia's largest bank, offering payments, transfers, and account management.
Popular e-wallet for payments, tolls, parking, and various services.

indonesia.description: Government-issued app for COVID-19 contact tracing, vaccination certificates, and health status.
Widely used e-wallet for payments, transfers, and various services, often integrated with GoJek.
Another popular e-wallet for payments, bills, and peer-to-peer transfers.
Official app for booking train tickets and managing travel on Indonesian railways.
Leading health tech platform for online doctor consultations, prescriptions, and medical appointments.

south-africa.description: South African government portal for accessing various public services and information, though a dedicated identity app is less common.
Digital bank offering a comprehensive banking experience with rewards and health integration.
Popular bank app for managing accounts, payments, and transfers, known for its affordability.
Widely used ride-hailing app for convenient transportation in major cities.
Healthcare app for managing medical aid benefits, claims, and accessing health services.

chile.description: Government-issued digital identity app for accessing public services and authenticating online.
Official government app providing information and access to a wide range of public services.
One of Chile's largest banks, offering a comprehensive mobile banking app.
Popular digital wallet and payment platform for online and in-store transactions.
Ride-sharing app widely used for transportation in Chilean cities.

poland.description: Official Polish government app for digital identity, official documents, and access to public services.
App from the Social Insurance Institution (ZUS) for managing social security contributions and benefits.
Mobile banking app from PKO Bank Polski, offering payments, transfers, and account management.

Comprehensive public transport app for planning journeys and checking schedules across Polish cities.
